description: A rigid, Kevlar‑reinforced exoskeletal harness designed to function like miniature power armor for a small quadruped. It locks into place, fully enclosing the torso in composite plates and preventing any other armor from being worn underneath.

A rigid, Kevlar‑reinforced exoskeletal harness designed to function like miniature power armor for a medium quadruped. Composite plates lock together to fully enclose the torso, preventing any other armor from being worn underneath.
